title: More Slabs Variants
description: Minecraft Mod That Adds Over 200+ New Slabs
body:
View the whole bio on CurseForge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mysticrift-more-slabs-variants

![Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bffa638dd353afe24bf9e5ad42376ef5de81ab1.png)

Hey everybody! welcome to my mod More slab variants. This mod adds a total of 216 new slabs to your Minecraft server. Diamond slab, Netherite slab, Concrete slabs, and much more! check out the tab: Gallery for all photos!

![Bug report.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbc34b76302f74e172ea8713657da2a485f213f2.png)

Report bugs via: issues ( Github )

![coming soon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11eb2f9b32b08b0593498dcd3bf522a5138dcabe.png)

- 1.20.4 Forge.
- More 1.20.4 slabs.
